detailedDescription:
8GB of DDR5 memory.
Entry point for the next-gen standard with higher speeds and on-die ECC.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 8GB
Generation: DDR5
Bandwidth: Up to 51.2 GB/s (DDR5-6400)
Voltage: 1.1V (1.35V+ for XMP/EXPO OC)
Slots: 1 x 8GB
On-Die ECC: Yes
XMP 3.0 / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1700, AM5
